creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
I will leave this PR opened for some time to see if any other developer is interested in resurrecting this port. I don't think it is a good idea given that the project uses still Qt4. They are testing as of now (last message yesterday) Qt5: https://github.com/NatronGitHub/Natron/issues/668.

See I'm not saying we should not resurrect this port. I think it is premature to do so now.
